LLPC.description: #llp #hl7 #client #sink This library implements the Lower Layer Protocol (LLP) over TCP/IP. This is commonly used for sending streams of HL7 data.
LLPC.name: LLP Client Library

LLPS.description: #llp #hl7 #server #source This library implements the Lower Layer Protocol (LLP) over TCP/IP. This is commonly used for receiving streams of HL7 data.
LLPS.name: LLP Server Library

https://bitbucket.org/interfaceware/hl7-.description: Example HL7 mapping channel #hl7 #custom #filter Copy this and customize for your needs.  This feeds from a source queue into a destination queue.
https://bitbucket.org/interfaceware/hl7-.name: Map HL7 -> HL7

https://bitbucket.org/interfaceware/hl7_.description:
#hl7 #llp #client #sink
This component will send HL7 messages to a port.  It using the LLP protocol.  This is a destination.
https://bitbucket.org/interfaceware/hl7_.name: HL7 Sender

https://bitbucket.org/interfaceware/hl7_.description:
#hl7 #llp #server #source
This component will receive HL7 messages on a port using the LLP protocol.  It is a source.
https://bitbucket.org/interfaceware/hl7_.name: HL7 Receiver

https://bitbucket.org/interfaceware/hl7-.description:
#hl7 #llp #server #test
This a self contained component for testing - it receives a stream of HL7 messages and logs them.  It should not be connected.
https://bitbucket.org/interfaceware/hl7-.name: Test Listener

https://bitbucket.org/interfaceware/hl7_.description:
#hl7 #llp #client #test
Self contained component to simulate a stream of HL7 messages to a HL7 Server port.  Use this for testing. It should not be connected.
https://bitbucket.org/interfaceware/hl7_.name: Test Simulator
